description: Use the Electrical Engineering Calculations app to perform a Delta-to-Star (Δ-Y) resistance conversion. Use the following resistance values for the Delta network: Resistor 1 (Ra/Rab) = 30 Ohms, Resistor 2 (Rb/Rbc) = 60 Ohms, and Resistor 3 (Rc/Rca) = 90 Ohms. Ensure the Star (Wye) equivalent resistances are calculated and visible on the screen.
